note: 30,000-foot Field Plan content by role key. Scope-specific overrides go under positions. County/city drill-down still pending.

event_lead.summary: Owns local event execution so the stop leaves permanent organization, not just a crowd.
event_lead.purpose: Locate venue, run logistics with Logistics Lead, keep the event funnel moving toward Power of Five launches.
event_lead.before_event: Confirm venue/parking/weather backup; stand up local event committee; sync calendar; drive timeline to Central Field/Volunteer Management.
event_lead.event_day: Run arrival → sign-in → registration check → Meet Kelly → Power of Five invite → role choice → training invite.
event_lead.after_event: Within 24h: thank-yous, photo recap, P5 kickoff invites. Within 1 week: orientation and neighborhood meetings.
event_lead.canvassing: Coordinate with Canvassing Lead on Saturday-prior door hangers inviting neighbors to meet Kelly.
event_lead.gotv: Every event should seed Power of Five capacity that later covers polls and October Strike Team Saturdays.
event_lead.time_commitment: Peaks in the two weeks before the event and 48 hours after.
event_lead.helpful_skills: Calm coordination, local knowledge, hospitality, willingness to co-lead.
event_lead.local_needs: Venue, parking, overflow, weather backup, local partners.

social_lead.summary: Local social + community belonging; pairs with Central Social for campaign graphics and protocol.
social_lead.purpose: Launch the social campaign with Central Social; plan pure social after-event; recruit through civic life.
social_lead.before_event: Wave One graphics with Central Social; Wave Two community calendars, FB groups, Nextdoor, org shares; Wave Three reminders.
social_lead.event_day: Capture content, welcome newcomers, steer people to sign-in and Power of Five.
social_lead.after_event: Photos/recap within 24h; after-event social plan; keep new contacts in the volunteer funnel.
social_lead.canvassing: Support shared messaging for door hangers and partner asks.
social_lead.gotv: Sustain recognition and digital toolkit use for Power of Five leaders.
social_lead.time_commitment: Light ongoing; heavy surrounding event windows.
social_lead.local_needs: Local influencers, group admins, photographer if available.

canvass_lead.summary: Neighborhood outreach around the event radius and October Strike Team Saturdays.
canvass_lead.purpose: Door hangers the Saturday before inviting people to meet Kelly and share community concerns.
canvass_lead.before_event: Map radius; train walkers; coordinate literature/door hangers; sync with Recruitment and Registration leads.
canvass_lead.event_day: Greeters and pathing; capture volunteer interest from walk conversations.
canvass_lead.after_event: Log doors, shifts, and follow-ups; feed Power of Five neighborhood coverage.
canvass_lead.canvassing: Primary lane — neighborhood walk, business visits where useful, Saturday-prior hangers.
canvass_lead.gotv: October Saturdays: canvass + Strike Team cookout staging with local candidates where appropriate.
canvass_lead.helpful_skills: Walking routes, coaching new canvassers, friendly ask.
canvass_lead.central_counterpart: County Strike Team · Field Director · Data Team

registration_lead.summary: Hits registration goals; builds local registration team plans with Central Voter Registration Director.
registration_lead.purpose: Separate operation from launch-team: county/city/campus/neighborhood registration goals.
registration_lead.before_event: Staff registration check at event funnel; recruit registration shifts for markets, faith, campuses.
registration_lead.event_day: Voter registration check is a required step in the arrival funnel.
registration_lead.after_event: Count completed registrations; schedule follow-on registration opportunities.
registration_lead.canvassing: Pair registration asks with door/neighborhood work where lawful and appropriate.
registration_lead.gotv: Registered-and-ready universe supports GOTV and poll coverage later.
registration_lead.time_commitment: Ongoing toward county/campus goals; spike around events.
registration_lead.helpful_skills: Forms knowledge, patient teaching, nonpartisan civic tone.
registration_lead.local_needs: Forms, clipboard stations, campus/high-school privacy rules.

community_lead.summary: Local volunteer recruitment lead — works with Central Volunteer Management / Field Manager.
community_lead.purpose: Build the local volunteer base around the event so the stop creates lasting organizers.
community_lead.before_event: Fill open leads/co-leads; ask every contact to bring a friend; feed orientation pipeline.
community_lead.event_day: Meet volunteers station; convert attendees into Power of Five / volunteer roles.
community_lead.after_event: 24h interest follow-up; 1 week orientation; move people up the leadership ladder.
community_lead.canvassing: Recruit canvassers for Saturday-prior and October Strike Team Saturdays.
community_lead.gotv: Grow reliable volunteers toward poll coverage and precinct leadership.
community_lead.helpful_skills: Ask carefully, place people well, celebrate progress.
community_lead.central_counterpart: Volunteer Management · Volunteer Manager · Field Director
community_lead.local_needs: Open roles list, orientation slot, contact preferences.

phone_bank_lead.summary: Invitations, volunteer asks, bring-a-friend, and follow-up around the event.
phone_bank_lead.purpose: Run phone/text invitation banks tied to the event catalyst timeline.
phone_bank_lead.before_event: Wave Three reminder calls; volunteer asks; confirm location/parking language.
phone_bank_lead.event_day: Standby for last-minute confirmation calls if needed.
phone_bank_lead.after_event: Thank-you / orientation invites for new interested contacts.
phone_bank_lead.canvassing: Complement doors with phone follow-up on soft IDs.
phone_bank_lead.gotv: Later used for GOTV reminders — keep lists clean with Data Team.
phone_bank_lead.time_commitment: Shift-based in the week before the event.
phone_bank_lead.central_counterpart: Phone Bank · Text Bank · Data Team · Email Team

postcard_lead.summary: Targeted postcard universe — often older/reliable/independent households.
postcard_lead.purpose: Handwritten outreach timed to the event and later GOTV.
postcard_lead.before_event: Drop to targeted universe before Wave Three reminders.
postcard_lead.event_day: Not primary; may collect thank-you writers.
postcard_lead.after_event: Thank-you cards for hosts/partners where useful.
postcard_lead.canvassing: Coordinate universes so doors and cards do not collide wastefully.
